title: Dinguz's Forge Optimization
description: That mod will optimize your forge client, cuz you know... forge likes lags
body:
## What DFO does?
It is optimizing your minecraft performace cuz minecraft is totally not optimized, and if you add mods on top... bruh.

**So if you don't know any Forge optimizing mods [or you're just lazy], i'll made a modpack that is for YOU!**

## Mods
![rubidium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5146288bc900a0925aba86b0ceef7a527cf07ac8.png)

**Rubidium is a Fork of SODIUM, for Forge. This is the main mod that optimizes your minecraft rendering and much more. It's the god of optimization.**

------
![spark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/305e481cc0f75453a7172da55c9d64402ca793ee.png)

**Spark is a performance profiler for your Minecraft client [it's just looking nice not doing anything abt your fps]**

------
![starlight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8eb590fc90e1ed1cc66ec18f490b241e14e4120c.png)

**Starlight rewrites the light engine to fix lighting performance and lighting errors [Like dark spots]**

------
![Immediatelyfast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/409e996df04e3b4f36ce2184af13ff9cafe0c372.png)

**ImmediatelyFast optimizes immediate mode rendering by using custom buffer do it is using your GPU more efficient way and it optimizes: Entities, Block entities, Particles, Text Rendering, GUI/HUD, Immediate mode rendering of other mods, Map rendering, Hud rendering, text rendering and much more.**

-----
![andmuchmore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c260ce14622b321bf7d92c9c9cba39674c4a20e2.png)

And there is much more! Like: **BadOptimizations, Clumps, Embeddium, Entity Culling, Fast IP Ping, FerriteCore, Packet Fixer...**

So now you know what mods are there and what they're doing. Hope the modpack is great!

-----
